---
name: "Repo Assist — Engineering investment (Task 4)"
about: "Ask Repo Assist to update dependencies, improve CI, or modernise the build."
title: "[repo-assist] Engineering: "
labels: ["repo-assist"]
---
/repo-assist Run Task 4 (Engineering Investments) as scoped below. Create a fresh branch, implement the change, build and test, then open a draft PR with an AI disclosure and a Test Status section.

<!--
Keep the /repo-assist line as the FIRST line of this issue — that is what triggers command mode.
Only owners/members/collaborators can trigger it.
-->

**Scope (pick or describe):**
- [ ] Dependency updates (prefer minor/patch; bundle Dependabot PRs)
- [ ] CI improvements (caching, speed, flaky tests, action upgrades)
- [ ] Tooling / SDK / runtime version bumps
- [ ] Build system simplification

**Details / constraints (optional):**
-
